RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: THE ENDOWMENT RENTS OUT OFFICE UNITS TO OTHER 501(C)(3) ORGANIZATIONS AT A LOWER THAN FMV RATE.

PROGRAM RELATED INVESTMENTS (PRIS) ARE AN INTEGRAL PART OF THE FOUNDATION'S EXEMPT PROGRAMS AND ARE UNDERTAKEN TO COMPLEMENT AND EXTEND ITS GRANTMAKING ACTIVITIES. PRIS ARE MADE TO FURTHER THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S MISSION AND VISION. PRIS ARE GENERALLY MADE AS LOANS ALTHOUGH OTHER INVESTMENT TYPES MAY BE USED AS ALLOWED UNDER IRC SECTION 4944. EACH PRI MEETS THE FOLLOWING THREE REQUIREMENTS: A) THE THE PRIMARY PURPOSE IS TO ACCOMPLISH ONE OR MORE OF THE FOUNDATION'S EXEMPT PURPOSES; B) PRODUCTION OF INCOME OR APPRECIATION OF PROPERTY IS NOT A SIGNIFICANT PURPOSE; AND C) PRI FUNDS ARE NOT USED TO INFLUENCE LEGISLATION OR TAKE PART IN POLITICAL CAMPAIGNS ON BEHALF OF CANDIDATES. SEE PART VIII-B AND STATEMENTS 21 AND 22 FOR A DESCRIPTION OF THE CHARITABLE PURPOSE OF EACH PRI MADE IN 2024.
GUARANTEE FEE INCOME IS RELATED TO PROGRAM-RELATED INVESTMENTS.
GRANT REFUND INTEREST INCOME REPRESENTS INTEREST EARNED BY GRANTEES ON GRANT FUNDS THAT WERE NOT USED AND HAVE BEEN REFUNDED TO THE ENDOWMENT
BOND INTEREST INCOME REPRESENTS THE INTEREST EARNED FROM THE TEMPORARY INVESTMENT OF BOND PROCEEDS, WHICH WERE GENERATED THROUGH BOND ISSUANCES INTENDED TO FUND GRANTS.

AllOtherProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Desc: ACCION OPPORTUNITY FUND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT: TO PROVIDE CAPITAL TO SUPPORT LENDING TO WOMEN AND LOW-TO-MODERATE INCOME ENTREPRENEURS THROUGHOUT CALIFORNIA.

BXB COMMUNITY INVESTMENT FUND: TO PROVIDE CATALYTIC CAPITAL TO SUPPORT BLOCK BY BLOCK, A COMPREHENSIVE NEW PROJECT FOCUSED ON NEIGHBORHOOD TRANSFORMATION LED BY LOCAL COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS IN TWO LOS ANGELES COUNTY NEIGHBORHOODS.

MDF ADVANCE CALIFORNIA FUND: TO PROVIDE MISSION DRIVEN FINANCE WITH LENDING CAPITAL TO SUPPORT PRIMARILY COMPANIES AND NONPROFITS WITH GAP-FILLING, CREATIVELY STRUCTURED FINANCING WITHOUT USING CREDIT SCORES OR PERSONAL GUARANTEES THROUGHOUT CALIFORNIA.
COLLAB FUND I, LLC: TO CLOSE THE WEALTH GAP BY INVESTING IN INNOVATIVE FOUNDERS.
RAVEN FUND II: TO EMPOWER INDIGENOUS ENTREPRENEURS WITH THE CAPITAL AND EXPERTISE THEY NEED TO SUCCEED.

COLLAB FUND II: TO SUPPORT THE FIRM'S EARLY-STAGE VENTURE CAPITAL INVESTMENTS IN THE TECH SECTOR COMPANIES, LOCATED OUTSIDE MAJOR TECH INVESTMENT AREAS IN THE SECTORS OF HEALTH AND WELLNESS, THE FUTURE OF WORK AND INFRASTRUCTURE ENABLEMENT.

ILLUMEN CATALYST: TO SUPPORT THE FIRM'S INVESTMENTS IN IMPACT-GENERATING PRIVATE-EQUITY AND VENTURE CAPITAL FUNDS AND COMPANIES WITHIN HEALTH AND WELLNESS, FINANCIAL INCLUSION, EDUCATION AND CLIMATE SUSTAINABILITY IMPACT AREAS.

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: 1. CENTER FOR HEALTHY COMMUNITIES AT THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENTTHE CENTER FOR HEALTHY COMMUNITIES (THE CENTER) IS COMPRISED OF VENUES IN LOS ANGELES, OAKLAND, AND SACRAMENTO, PROVIDING MEETING SPACES TO MOBILIZE COMMUNITY AND CIVIC LEADERS, HEALTH PROVIDERS, ADVOCATES AND POLICYMAKERS IN THE SEARCH FOR SOLUTIONS TO CALIFORNIA'S CRITICAL HEALTH AND HEALTHCARE ISSUES.THE CENTER OFFERS A VARIETY OF PROGRAMS AND SERVICES THROUGHOUT CALIFORNIA, INCLUDING CONFERENCE CENTERS, AND RESEARCH AND TRAINING FACILITIES. BY COMBINING ALL THESE RESOURCES IN ONE ACCESSIBLE LOCATION, THE CENTER AIMS TO BECOME THE PREMIER VENUE FOR ACTIVITIES ADDRESSING CALIFORNIA'S HEALTH CHALLENGES, AND A LAUNCH PAD FOR COLLABORATIVE ACTION.THE CENTER PROVIDES: - MEETING SPACES AVAILABLE FREE OF CHARGE, FOR QUALIFIED NONPROFIT ORGANIZATIONS WHOSE PROGRAMS ADVANCE THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S MISSION TO EXPAND ACCESS TO AFFORDABLE, QUALITY HEALTH CARE FOR UNDERSERVED INDIVIDUALS AND COMMUNITIES, AND TO PROMOTE FUNDAMENTAL IMPROVEMENTS IN THE HEALTH STATUS OF ALL CALIFORNIANS. - PUBLIC EVENT MANAGEMENT SERVICES INCLUDING EVENT SUPPORT, EVENT PUBLICITY AND AUDIENCE MANAGEMENT - ONLINE LEARNING COMMUNITY

2. MEDIA CAMPAIGNS BY THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT - M. ENTERTAINMENTM. ENTERTAINMENT PROVIDED THE MEDIA-BUY SERVICES TO THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT (TCE) INCLUDING THE FOLLOWING CAMPAIGNS:"UNITY 2025" - DIGITAL BILLBOARDS PROMOTING UNITY 2025 IN SACRAMENTO AND CENTRAL VALLEY."BELONGING CAMPAIGN 2025 CENTRAL VALLEY" - BILLBOARDS, DIGITAL ADVERTISEMENTS AND OTT PROMOTING TCE'S BELONGING CAMPAIGN IN ALL OF CALIFORNIA."HOLIDAY CARD" - TCE 2025 HOLIDAY CARD PROMOTED IN SOCIAL MEDA SUCH AS IG/TIK-TOK AND YOUTUBE."2024-2025 OOH ALAMEDA & MAIN" - TCE FULL YEAR BUYOUT ON OOH BILLBOARD IN SOCAL."YOUTH AWARDS 2024" - YOUTH ANNOUNCEMENT FEATURING 2024 YOUTH AWARD WINNERS IN ALL CALIFORNIA. "ELLIOT PAGE LIVE EVENT" - SOCIAL MEDIA PAGE PROVOTING ELLIOT PAGE LIVE EVENT IN CALIFORNIA."BELONGING CAMPAIGN AN VOTING BOOST 2024" - BILLBOARDS, SOCIAL MEDIA ADVERTISEMENTS AND OTT PROMOTING TCE'S BELONGING AND VOTING IN ALL OF CALIFORNIA.

3. LAMONT DIGITAL, LLCTHE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT (TCE) ENGAGED LAMONT DIGITAL, LLC MAINLY FOR THE FOLLOWING: TO SUPPORT THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S VARIOUS SOCIAL MEDIA CHANNELS TO AMPLIFY A MESSAGE OF HEALTH FOR ALL CALIFORNIANS AND TO SUPPORT AND MANAGE THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORMS TO ELEVATE THE THEME OF HEALTH AND EQUITY IN CALIFORNIA.

4. CARSTENS, BLACK & MINTEER LLPTHE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT (TCE) ENGAGED CARSTENS, BLACK & MINTEER LLP MAINLY FOR THE FOLLOWING: TO REPRESENT THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT IN LITIGATION AND AT PUBLIC HEARINGS CHALLENGING LA METRO'S APPROVAL PROCESS AND FINAL ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT REPORT FOR THE ERECTION OF A PRIVATE GONDOLA OVER AND THROUGH CHINATOWN AND OTHER ADJACENT NEIGHBORHOODS, IN AN EFFORT TO SUPPORT THE COMMUNITY.
